hooks.prompt: Inspect $ARGUMENTS to get the bash command being executed. If the command contains 'git commit' or 'git push': (1) Act as the TestUpdate agent — read tests/ and relevant source files, update or add tests to cover recent changes, run `python -m pytest tests/ -v` and ensure all tests pass. (2) Act as the UpdateProjectDocs agent — read README.md, CLAUDE.md, AUDIT.md, TECH-SPEC.MD and update any sections that are stale given recent code changes. If the command does NOT contain 'git commit' or 'git push', do nothing. Return {"ok": true} when done, or {"ok": false, "reason": "<details>"} if tests fail.
